global.description: Multi-project cockpit for Mika AI projects.
global.privacyNotice: Commit only sanitized metadata while the repository is public. Keep private notes, screenshots, chat backups and real project evidence local or in a private repository.

backupPolicy.overdueRule: A chat is overdue when marked needed/overdue or when meaningful work has no linked backup.

scopeRules.globalExport: Contains all projects, all local project states, conflict copies and all locally stored screenshots.
scopeRules.projectExport: Contains only the selected project, its local state and screenshots assigned to that project.
scopeRules.globalImport: Accepts global workspace backups and legacy backups; rejects project-scoped V1.1 backups.
scopeRules.projectImport: Accepts project-scoped backups and legacy backups; rejects global workspace backups.

privateRepoWorkflow: Keep secrets outside repository files even when the repository is private.
Store raw chat backups only in intentionally protected paths or encrypted archives.
Review every project-data change before commit.
Create a global export before structural migrations.
Use project exports for scoped handoffs and device transfers.

roles.name: ChatGPT Project
roles.responsibility: Organizational center and durable project context.

roles.name: Masterchat
roles.responsibility: Project steering, quality control, decisions, handoffs and PR review.

roles.name: Subchats
roles.responsibility: Specialized analysis areas created and handed back to the masterchat.

roles.name: Claude Code
roles.responsibility: Implementation only after a clear, reviewed handoff.

roles.name: Gemini
roles.responsibility: Second opinion, long-context review and alternative assessment.

checklist.label: Assumptions, risks and open questions are visible.
Architecture, data model and security frame are reviewed.
Acceptance criteria and test strategy are defined.
Handoff includes context, allowed files, safety rules and expected result.
Branch, scope and test instructions are unambiguous.
Automated and manual checks are documented.
Result, deviations and open points were reviewed.
Beta or release criteria are met.
Project state, chats and handoffs have current backups.

handoffTypes.name: Subchat → Masterchat
handoffTypes.purpose: Return specialist results, decisions and open risks.

handoffTypes.name: Implementation → Review
handoffTypes.purpose: Report changed files, tests, limitations and exact branch state.

handoffTypes.name: Project status backup
handoffTypes.purpose: Preserve durable project context before major transitions.

modelRoutingRules.workType: Project steering, requirements, review, decisions and handoffs
modelRoutingRules.rule: Keep the masterchat authoritative and record decisions explicitly.

modelRoutingRules.fallback: Another coding model after reviewed handoff
modelRoutingRules.rule: Implementation starts only after scope, allowed files and acceptance criteria are clear.
Use as second opinion; do not silently replace masterchat decisions.
